title: carex aquatilis var. dives
intro: Carex aquatilis var. dives, also known as water sedge or burvassel, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex aquatilis var. dives include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
